core_business: Multi-GPU SP1 proving cluster for cloud/bare-metal. Accepts proof requests via SDK gateway or cluster API, persists them in Postgres, schedules tasks (Controller, ProveShard, CoreExecute, Recursion, Shrink/Plonk/Groth16Wrap) across GPU/CPU workers via a balanced policy, stores artifacts in S3 (persistent) or Redis (ephemeral with admission). Bridges the cluster to the Succinct Prover Network via fulfiller (submit/fail/cancel/schedule) and bidder for mainnet operations.

core_modules.description: Hosts ClusterService gRPC for proof_request CRUD backed by Postgres (sqlx); the sole owner of cluster DB connectivity; serves HTTP /healthz on API_HTTP_ADDR.

sub_modules.function: ClusterServiceImpl — proof_request_create/cancel/update/get/list via sqlx::PgPool
Boot: PgPool, optional sqlx migrations on API_AUTO_MIGRATE=true, tonic gRPC + tonic-web, axum HTTP

core_modules.description:
In-memory cluster scheduler — owns Coordinator

, hosts WorkerService gRPC, dispatches tasks to workers, polls bin/api via ClusterServiceClient.

sub_modules.function:
Coordinator

: proofs/tasks/workers state, create_proof, create_task_internal, complete_task, fail_task, fail_proof_internal
GenericWorkerService: WorkerService gRPC impl with jemalloc + tcp/http2 keepalive + tonic-web; spawns proof status/claimer/heartbeat/periodic tasks
Glue to bin/api: spawn_proof_status_task forwards ProofResult to ProofRequestUpdate; spawn_proof_claimer_task polls for Pending+!handled rows
AssignmentPolicy implementations — BalancedPolicy (default), DefaultPolicy

core_modules.description: CPU or GPU worker process — selects artifact backend (s3/redis), connects to coordinator over gRPC streaming, dispatches NewTask to SP1ClusterWorker::run_task; drains on shutdown (DRAIN_TIMEOUT=30min); aborts tasks > TASK_TIMEOUT=6h.

sub_modules.function: Bootstrap, artifact backend selection, circuit pre-install for CPU, main worker loop, heartbeat, drain

core_modules.description: SPN ↔ cluster sync binary — wires Fulfiller (run loop submit/fail/cancel/schedule) over a chosen artifact backend and MainnetFulfiller.

sub_modules.function: Bootstrap: rustls ring, ProverNetworkClient, artifact backend dispatch, run_fulfiller
FulfillmentNetwork impl: submit_request (FulfillProofRequestBody), get_cancelable_requests (parallel Assigned+Unexecutable / Unfulfillable queries), fail_request_with_error

core_modules.description: SPN bid loop — polls every 3s, evaluates capacity + per-mode toggles, signs BidRequestBody with local PrivateKeySigner.

sub_modules.function: Bidder::run bid_requests with biddable-before-assigned ordering; can_fulfill_proof capacity logic
configure_endpoint mirroring crates/fulfillment constants

core_modules.description: SDK-compatible ProverNetwork + ArtifactStore gRPC gateway; HTTP artifact proxy; durable ProgramStore (fs/memory); auth via EIP-191.

sub_modules.function: ProverNetworkImpl + ArtifactStoreImpl over ClusterServiceClient + ArtifactClient
URI / id minting and round-trip: mint_request_id (32-byte), proof_id_from_request_id, program_artifact_id (vk_hash deterministic), artifact_type_segment
Auth modes None/Verify/Allowlist — EIP-191 signature recovery for create_program/request_proof/create_artifact
Durable program registry — FilesystemProgramStore (.tmp + rename) or InMemoryProgramStore
Cluster proto ↔ SDK proto enum mapping (fulfillment_from_cluster, execution_from_cluster, cluster_*_filter)

core_modules.description: Developer CLI — bench + vk-gen subcommands; uses crates/utils request_proof helpers; not part of runtime data plane.

sub_modules.function: bench, vk_gen subcommands

core_modules.description: ArtifactClient + CompressedUpload backends — S3 (zstd lvl 3, 32 MiB multipart) and Redis (zstd lvl 0, sharded deadpool-redis, admission control with #[must_use] AdmissionGuard).

sub_modules.function: S3ArtifactClient with S3DownloadMode::AwsSDK | REST transport adapters
RedisArtifactClient + admission control + ShardPermit + refcount via refs:{id}
Admission and ProveShardGate integration tests verifying TOCTOU + OOM guarantees

core_modules.description: Cross-binary shared infrastructure — proto re-exports, ClusterServiceClient, logger (OTLP), task_weight consts, backoff_retry helpers.

sub_modules.function: ClusterServiceClient + reconnect_with_backoff helper
backoff_retry + status_to_backoff_error + BackoffError trait + get_private_ip
OpenTelemetry + tracing_subscriber init (Once-guarded)
task_weight + WORKER_*_WEIGHT env-tunable lazy_statics

core_modules.description: Fulfiller primitives + FulfillmentNetwork trait — used by bin/fulfiller and any executor binary.

sub_modules.function: Fulfiller<A,N>: submit_requests / fail_requests / cancel_requests / schedule_requests loop
FulfillmentNetwork + NetworkRequest traits; should_download_proofs default true
configure_endpoint helper for SPN-side gRPC

core_modules.description: High-level request_proof helpers used by bin/cli — uploads artifacts, polls get_proof_request, downloads completed proof.

sub_modules.function: request_proof helpers for CLI-style flows

core_modules.description: SP1ClusterWorker — dispatches TaskType to per-task handlers in src/tasks/; WorkerServiceClient with explicit per-call retry budgets; OpenTelemetry context propagation.

sub_modules.function: SP1ClusterWorker::run_task dispatching TaskType to handlers
WorkerServiceClient (gRPC) + retry::infinite/bounded module
Per-task handlers: controller, core_execute, execute_only, finalize (Plonk/Groth16), prove_shard, recursion, setup, shrink_wrap, vk_gen
get_max_weight from sys_info + WORKER_MAX_WEIGHT_OVERRIDE

summary: Rust backend (7 bins + 5 crates): multi-GPU SP1 proving cluster — gRPC API on Postgres, coordinator scheduling GPU/CPU workers, S3+Redis artifacts, SDK gateway, SPN fulfiller and bidder.
